evidence_notes: Judged owned_repair_batch94 against OpenCPN local render witnesses, S-52 metadata, and semantic briefs.
This slice is mostly tiny line/pattern symbology; chart-scale family and cadence are the primary acceptance criteria.
Pass means judge_pass_pending_final_approval only; no symbol is final human-approved.

selection.pass_semantics: pass-pending-human only; this artifact grants zero final approvals

verdicts.expected: FSHFAC04 is pattern of symbols for an area with fish traps, fish weirs, tunny nets. It is used as a pattern of symbols for an area with fish traps, fish weirs, tunny nets. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined. symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference Preserve the S-57/S-52 symbol class; do not substitute a different buoy/beacon/topmark/hazard family. Preserve load-bearing colours and colour order. Preserve topmark count/orientation and band pattern when present. Use provider images as semantic/shape witnesses; Helm output remains generated-owned artwork.
verdicts.judge_comments: PASS-PENDING-HUMAN. FSHFAC04 now follows the OpenCPN local witness for pattern of symbols for an area with fish traps, fish weirs, tunny nets: the symbol family, stroke cadence, direction cue, and chart-scale proportions are preserved. Human final approval is still required.
verdicts.observed: FSHFAC04 now follows the OpenCPN local witness for pattern of symbols for an area with fish traps, fish weirs, tunny nets: the symbol family, stroke cadence, direction cue, and chart-scale proportions are preserved.
